reviews.review_description: This game has blown me away it looks amazing and is probably one of if not my favorite fan game of all time
Pls let me out of basment
I low key should be mod for the game

This game is just copied and pasted. Owner Is lazy and make other people do his job. There's a latter just sitting there. And there's hackers taking over the game. I see potential but right now it sucks

developer_response.body: We are sorry that you feel that way about the game. We would like to mention that one thing you stated was very incorrect. It was about the "Owner being lazy and making others do his job" This is extremely false due to the fact that there are only two developers and one owner managing the whole game. The owner takes care of all the player data, and updates. Adding another layer, he tries his best to ensure the game is fun for all. The floating ladder is a small thing that he simply didn't notice, and put out by accident. One last thing I would like to inform you about are the hackers "Taking over the game" This problem is not in our control, meaning we can't do any more than we have already done to fix it. Based off of your entire review, we can tell you don't have any background information on the owner, developers, and hackers. Next time you write a review, make sure to know what you are talking about in the review instead of grabbing random false information from out of nowhere.

reviews.review_description: this game is amazing the graphic are so good should go play there are very cool physic that most fan games dont have the horror is really fun and scary the gamemodes are very fun i would highly suggest playing
The colliders don't even work correctly

developer_response.body: That was an in-game glitch. We patched in the new update. Sorry for any inconvenience.
